import pickle
import dill


def load_model(path):
    with open(path, "rb") as f:
        return pickle.load(f)


def load_state(path):
    with open(path, "rb") as f:
        return dill.load(f)


def deserialize_cache(data):
    return pickle.loads(data)


def restore_session(raw_bytes):
    return dill.loads(raw_bytes)
